title: "BcdAdd"

# `BcdAdd`

**Systems:** MOS6502  
**Parameters:** `a, a, n`

---

<div markdown="0" class="trse-help-body">

<h3>BcdAdd( [address 1], [address 2], [number] );</h3>
<ul>
<li>[address 1] - The address of the BCD number</li>
<li>[address 2] - The address of the BCD number to add</li>
<li>[number] - The length of the BCD in bytes</li>
</ul>


<h3>Description</h3>
<p>
Adds the second BCD number to the first.
</p>


<h3>Example</h3>

<code>
var
    score: array[] of byte = ($12,$34,$56); // number is 563412
    scoreadd: array[] of byte = ($01,$00,$00);

begin
    BcdAdd( score, scoreadd, 3 );
    // result = 563413

</code>


</div>
